pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.6) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.6). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Data and AI Strategy Consultant.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.6. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant.
